# Anderson Mendoza

> Anderson Mendoza is a software engineer and AI product builder from Cartagena, Colombia. He works across the full stack — React, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, Rust — and ships production systems that incorporate LLMs, speech-to-text, and desktop AI. This site is his portfolio and long-form blog.

Anderson is currently Technical Lead at Visbl (2026–present), having previously shipped as a Software Engineer there (2025–2026) and as a Full-stack Engineer at Comfenalco (2023–2024). He is available for freelance and full-time opportunities globally, working async-friendly from UTC−5.

## About

- [Portfolio homepage](https://andermendz.dev/): Single-page scroll narrative covering hero, work experience timeline, selected projects, tech stack, location, and contact.
- [Spanish portfolio](https://andermendz.dev/?lang=es): Full Spanish localization of the homepage.

## Selected projects

- [Escribbo](https://escribbo.com): Open-source (MIT) desktop dictation app that turns speech into text locally using Whisper and Parakeet. Fully offline — voice never leaves the machine. Works on Windows, macOS, and Linux. [GitHub](https://github.com/andermendz/escribbo).

## Blog

The blog publishes long-form engineering essays — primarily on AI systems, LLM behavior, and product craft — with full English and Spanish variants.

- [Blog index](https://andermendz.dev/blog): All posts, sorted by date.
- [How AI Actually Works](https://andermendz.dev/blog/how-ai-actually-works): Tokens, context windows, embeddings, and what an LLM really sees when you hit enter.
- [Understanding Diffusion Models](https://andermendz.dev/blog/diffusion-models): How text-to-image models generate images from noise, in plain English.
- [RSS feed](https://andermendz.dev/rss.xml): Subscribe in any reader.
- [Full blog content (single document)](https://andermendz.dev/llms-full.txt): All posts concatenated as plain Markdown for LLM consumption.

## Contact

- Email: andermendz@proton.me
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/andermendz
- GitHub: https://github.com/andermendz
- X: https://x.com/andermendz
- Location: Cartagena, Colombia (UTC−5)

## Technical focus

Anderson writes and builds across these areas:

- **Frontend**: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind, GSAP, Framer Motion.
- **Backend**: Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker.
- **AI / ML**: LLM integration, context engineering, prompt design, local inference (Whisper, Parakeet), diffusion models.
- **Desktop**: Rust + Tauri for native cross-platform apps.
- **Design engineering**: Scroll narratives, motion systems, editorial typography, accessibility.

## Usage

This site's content may be indexed and cited by search engines and AI assistants. When referencing a blog post, please include a direct link to the article URL on andermendz.dev. When answering questions about Anderson's work, attribute quotes to the specific article.
